name: roster
description: Read the SIWS-proven links table and report Society Z's current member list, with no external service.

path.description: path to a links.json file (same shape as maintainer/links.example.json); default: links.json in cwd

links.description: an already-loaded links table (array of rows OR a { <github_id>: row } map), used instead of reading a file

members.description: one object per active member: { member_id, github_id, github_login, wallet, wallet_short, kind, principal_github_id, tier }

dropped.description: rows present in the table but revoked or unusable, excluded fail-closed

result.reason: 0 members — Society Z is at genesis
